title: Sugar's Role Comes Into Focus
description: Pages 16–16 focus on sugar's role comes into focus, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Zoro, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Keep it down, you idiot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That chicken- head guy led me over here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: On the way here, he started foaming at the mouth...

summary: Sugar's Role Comes Into Focus focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Zoro, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.
